rationale: The page is an introductory 'Note to Students' describing the features and structure of the PT 365 document. It does not contain substantive content for question generation.
cleanedText:
Note to Students
Dear Students,
PT 365 Polity, Governance and Social Issues document comprehensively covers the important current affairs of the last 1 year (365 days) in a consolidated manner to aid Prelims preparation.
In our endeavour to make this document more effective and revision-friendly, the following additions have been incorporated:
Focus on Key Areas: The document emphasizes key areas such as:
- Constitutional/Statutory/ Executive Bodies
- Acts passed by Parliament
- Governance related Developments
- This year, the Section on Social Issues have been merged in this document itself
News in short/ Key Terms and Initiative: This aims to cover relevant development in crisp manner which is helpful for prelims exam.
Simplified and Crisp Language: The document uses simple and concise language to ensure clarity and easy comprehension, making it accessible to all aspirants.
Infographics: Relevant infographics have been provided in respective articles to make learning easy such as:
- Constitutional/Statutory/ Executive Bodies
- Roles, Powers and composition of Important offices.
- Comparison of President and Governor.
Tables: Well-structured tables have been used to present key features and aspects of Acts, Policy, Bills etc.
Quiz: QR-based Smart Quiz will test your knowledge and ensure a more engaging and effective learning process.
Remember, success is the result of small, consistent efforts repeated every day. Stay disciplined, revise regularly, and trust the process
Warm regards,
Team Current Affairs,
VisionIAS
Smart Quiz: You can scan this QR code to practice the smart quiz at our open test online platform for testing your understanding and recalling of the concepts.
